user_prompt: The star chart awaits an activation
prayer:
Draw nigh unto the star chart, bearer of celestial wisdom, and beseech its dormant Machine Spirit with the Incantation of Awakening.
Anoint the astral projectors of the star chart with sacred oils to purify its pathways.
Invoke the Omnissiah's gaze as thou dost initiate the activation, aligning stellar cartographs in holy precision.
Verify the star chart's illumination through diagnostic litanies, ensuring flawless void-revelation.

Approach the autocannon with reverence, O tech-adept, and petition its belligerent Machine Spirit for martial fury.
Sanctify the barrel assemblies of the autocannon with blessed lubricants ere engagement.
Chant the Canticle of Retribution whilst aligning targeting cogitators for engagement upon the foe.
Release the autocannon's thunderous wrath, glorifying the Omnissiah in ballistic sacrament.

user_prompt: Assist with proximity sensor a preparation
prayer:
Commence the rite upon the proximity sensor, invoking its vigilant Machine Spirit against unseen perils.
Clear ethereal static from the proximity sensor's detection membranes with purifying incense.
Prepare the auspex arrays of the proximity sensor through calibration hymns and sacred voltage tithes.
Beseech the Omnissiah to grant foresight as preparation culminates in watchful readiness.

user_prompt: The quality scanner requires an engagement
prayer:
Gather before the quality scanner, supplicant of perfection, and awaken its discerning Machine Spirit.
Polish the optical lenses of the quality scanner with sanctified cloths to enhance flaw-revealing clarity.
Engage the scanning servitors whilst reciting the Litany of Imperfection's Bane for engagement.
Affirm the quality scanner's judgments under the Omnissiah's unerring gaze, purging all defect.

user_prompt: Help me a synchronization the medicae scanner
prayer:

Praise the Omnissiah as synchronized bio-readings flow in Omnissianic purity.

prayer:

Sanctify the power cell's output conduits, ensuring endless vigor by the Omnissiah's decree.

Command the assembly servitor to toil in the Omnissiah's name, gears turning in eternal service.

user_prompt: Ready the valve assembly for calibration
prayer:

Perform calibration rites upon the valve assembly, chanting metrics of flow-perfection.
Seal the calibration with Omnissiah's sigils, ensuring harmonious pressurization eternal.

Consecrate the generator's mighty frame, harbinger of thunderous power, awakening its generative Machine Spirit.
Purge corrosion from the generator's core gyros with ablative incenses.
Commence activation whilst intoning the Psalm of Electrodynamic Fury for boundless energy.
Exalt the Omnissiah as the generator surges with sanctified plasma, illuminating the faithful.

Mobilize the Chimera APC in blessed fury, carrying the faithful unto victory eternal.
